---
title: "test_compile_session_traces_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_compile_session_traces_empire.py"
loc: 19
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.88
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.27
---

## Intent
The `test_compile_session_traces_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_trace_analyzer_summary, test_trace_analyzer_empty. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_trace_analyzer_summary, test_trace_analyzer_empty. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.compile_session_traces](file://src.tools.compile_session_traces)

### Exports
- `test_trace_analyzer_summary`
- `test_trace_analyzer_empty`
